textByHash.eedab0d2941350a64a05abf98746b35c5757ff55: Commander Fullore! How wonderful to see you.
textByHash.7ffcf30d5b3b07fe3c1e268767a4379b96a6de2c: Why, I'm here about Sophia Hughes of course! As the person who discovered her corruption in the first place, I was an obvious choice to lead the investigation into her disappearance.
textByHash.3f5ec9f0a5355d11816c0a1375b3ea0e146bb32e: Ah, and hello again, my financially challenged friend! Of course, the capture of Sophia Hughes wouldn't have been possible without your minor contributions.
textByHash.4536bf98b3eedf01803f93e42eae1a779b640d4e: Well, that's just the thing. Councillor Andrews was so impressed with my work, he put me in charge of this investigation.
textByHash.4f15e6b42896aa5c9a300080615c72bb485e77b9: He is head of the Council. If he wants to make that call, he can.
textByHash.d56493d683dd478de089021a150b02248eae347b: Look, I can see you're very passionate, which is wonderful. Tell you what, as you're so eager, I'll allow you both to help me in my investigation.
textByHash.716c6b8b062e40ba9526f71798076fa46fc9afca: Do join me inside when you're ready.
textByHash.4cf93bc6e9967e5168255b15c7178c0380cd9f2a: Hello again. Your desire to help out with my investigation is to be commended, but you really shouldn't worry. I'll have the former Councillor back in a cell in no time.
textByHash.31bdf94c63e0edbce79e69983f44ed9c42878805: Not just yet. It won't be long though. Not with my resourcefulness!
textByHash.dd985c4d17794486aea72b9b3a3fe0a7b37b0c47: How very kind of you. I should tell you though, a skillset like mine isn't gained over night. If you wish to become like me, it will take a lot of hard work.
textByHash.a7a1064fc5d1d90cf77a635227926d00696d23d0: Mount Quidamortem? That's quite the trek.
textByHash.84e7d24f998b3253db652665038d2c6c09febb2a: How very kind of you, but no need. This is my investigation, and I will handle it.
textByHash.b9a018dc8a82fa879f70b26a18ea4ec84642256a: Hmm. What are you doing here Martin?
textByHash.7d2ce1f19ba0a2f34f99637ae497442182450e76: This would be easier if you told the truth.
textByHash.d4951c85a0d438bf5c0794f380a0ce7edd91c996: For you, I'm afraid it is. Martin Holt, I am arresting you for inciting violence against the Kourend Council.
textByHash.dff54fbbffea849415fdadf4f6496083e5de6e71: You have encouraged people to take up arms against the rightful rulers of Kourend.
textByHash.a774091b63b1acf00749ceaf5c2000c7f851d39e: The people can express their concerns through the proper channels. Now, I must ask that you come with us at once.
textByHash.0006d6c80910aaa9e91231ef9be6aa1eaa48d13e: Come now, Martin. Let's not go there. You know how it ends.
textByHash.48d8430f1208cf5703c9244cca944813ad79b3c0: Greetings. What can I do for you?
textByHash.2e2266d8913afee017726b4f2b5259ccaf6d7906: I'm conducting important business here for the Kourend Council.
textByHash.75098999f7e07f7485005f71b69b4bc0dbb50674: Hmm, I suppose I could use some assistance. However, you're not really the person I need for this task.
textByHash.e00ac2831c427d22206983df30da8c703db5fda7: Hmm, I suppose I could use some assistance. I'm here to investigate some unusual happenings in Port Piscarilius.
textByHash.b3a0f88d48ec425265fc3b5644b1bd6d25f1cda8: Although it's called a kingdom, Great Kourend hasn't actually had a king for many years. These days Kourend is a republic and it is ruled by the Kourend Council.
textByHash.d504d3732283378c22f6b346a8c94362171416fd: The Council consists of four councillors who are elected by the people every four years. The current councillors are Councillor Hughes, Councillor Unkar, Councillor Orson and Councillor Andrews.
textByHash.00b4a6dbd440955e826052b8a994bb28e351ed04: Can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.5d1ead6c5bf9ae1a1975e2d6d0138811295da9aa: Well there is something I could use some help with. However, you're not really the person I need for this task.
textByHash.13a39bc1e3bc5cb1ba474e85a7d15fcc9b262342: Well there is something I could use some help with. I'm here to investigate some unusual happenings in Port Piscarilius.
textByHash.d03601f12987f85d72f8ad19ec0e3fff5069c648: Port Piscarilius is home to various gangs. They're a nuisance, but up until now we haven't had much trouble in dealing with them.
textByHash.2ded59a2f8abd79d2c1c8ce4eb84a53bb6043d34: A new gang calling themselves the Saviours of Kourend has recently formed. That's not surprising as gangs come and go all of the time, but this one is different.
textByHash.791f491cac567c4ed18742cd5822fa1ff5e93836: The Saviours of Kourend have been absorbing many of the other gangs. Within a few weeks, they've already become the largest gang in Kourend and more join them each day.
textByHash.727de8b6cb225021ceb383315872a0acade9fa51: The talk amongst the people is that it's all down to their leader, a mysterious figure known only as the Queen of Thieves.
textByHash.ea4d1b6b344b497a7ffd49e4dfc917193d634f58: Shauna Piscarilius is the ruler of Port Piscarilius, but she spends most of her time galavanting around in that boat of hers rather than looking after her home.
textByHash.46e7c76a4ff0a1aeb53243bb6770f2b95179c942: Well my original plan was to infiltrate the gang to get close to the queen and capture her. However, I've been unable to make any progress. Apparently, I don't look the part.
textByHash.6cf13f939333f803ffb92930066162eb5699f987: Quite right. They're quite insistent though, so someone else will need to give it a go. You look like you might be just the type they're after.
textByHash.005994a9c73adbb8a4ddfdbdaba90bc5b5905f4f: Anyway, if you're up for the task you'll need to infiltrate the Saviours of Kourend, find the Queen of Thieves, apprehend her and then bring her to me.
textByHash.cd9b23cadaa7e7c0690427e9e3df94f2f6f81c01: So, do you think you can do it?
textByHash.ab25e7be652369585af619b8677899d8a2cad41c: Excellent. The Saviours of Kourend must have their headquarters somewhere nearby. You should ask around town and see if anyone knows where they are. Good luck.
textByHash.9ba454800f66860ec93eeec5f27f138ea20a41f4: Fair enough. I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.42694a87f1a79555c6b5fbea4f094c38696eb9e9: You need to infiltrate the Saviours of Kourend, find the Queen of Thieves, apprehend her and then bring her to me.
textByHash.fdb5cac24362b919957258bb6ee782b86aef5ee9: The Saviours of Kourend headquarters will be somewhere nearby. You might be able to learn more by asking around town.
textByHash.7ccfea3de3792a1e0061003b7a90b730a88fe38d: Blimey! Forget the Queen of Thieves. If this letter is to be believed, Councillor Hughes is working with those vile Disciples of Yama. I must report this to the Council immediately.
textByHash.d9acf442620c0f3a9242a95ec58e319c99df69bf: You've done a great service to the people of Kourend. As I'm sure you know, there is no greater reward than the satisfaction of a job well done.
textByHash.54b7a1ab76de74034336d225d92227469011d4a7: Now be on your way. I have a lot of work to do.
textByHash.5e0dfdbe38d7608760ba2d5193b0c3adb885218a: They're a group of deranged cultists that worship some sort of demon. They're not a big threat compared to the lizardmen, but they're still an enemy to Kourend.
textByHash.7c461a5087416ac384b01295c0e265fe9c167583: Indeed. I must report this to the Council immediately.
textByHash.f3329fd4edaeca8e9feff9844818e1a5ca936b8b: Hello. Thanks again for your help.
textByHash.a0d506eff9c1df070a662faa2deb622bdbabb76f: There is something I could use some help with. I'm here on behalf of the Kourend Council to investigate some unusual happenings in Port Piscarilius.
textByHash.4b59835c1c1bfb17c3880aff9da10b198e213398: The Saviours of Kourend have been absorbing many of the other gangs. Within a few weeks they've already become the largest gang in Kourend and more join them each day.
textByHash.b87aabc780a0c2b72fa726b5aeaf7500aa52e060: Anyway if you're up for the task you'll need to infiltrate the Saviours of Kourend, find the Queen of Thieves, apprehend her and then bring her to me.
textByHash.0a823aff16efd0b2f06afbf90325cf963db53729: So are you up for it?
textByHash.8d7e47ec9d893350155613ef9d07f3078b5fe1bc: Well there is something I could use some help with. I'm here on behalf of the Kourend Council to investigate some unusual happenings in Port Piscarilius.
textByHash.1a6957d73fca1350f84c4ec4d7ae8669fde13731: Well come back to me once you have the Queen of Thieves.
textByHash.85b7a4b22404dc66d642f5237420c7dce8c82cdd: Very well thank you. My work in bringing down Councillor Hughes means that I'm finally starting to get the recognition that I deserve.
textByHash.c07e47f36705cc92ce91f471dc561fb5cbfec538: Yes, yes, very good job. I'll make sure to mention you in my acceptance speech when I'm voted in as her replacement.
textByHash.fc1520390f0c91618545e3ca304f8db94757943c: I'm ruined. Everything was perfect under the Council, but now I'm right back in the dirt again.
textByHash.e6bd6501d5152534acd91aac07ed2ad9f56dd774: But I didn't keep my job. Now I spend every day doing boring administrative work. It's a nightmare.
